hero.title: yduck
hero.subtitle: New Mac? One command to set up everything.
hero.description: CLI tools + AI extensions, installed and ready to use.

items.problem_desc: Every new Mac means spending hours manually installing dozens of tools and forgetting half the configs.
items.solution_desc: YAML recipes define installation steps. One command restores your entire dev environment.

items.problem_desc: Manually editing JSON, installing dependencies, setting env vars — beginners give up.
items.solution_desc: TUI walks you through installation. Configs are collected interactively and written automatically.

items.problem_desc: So many CLI tools and AI extensions out there. Which ones are worth it? How to use them?
items.solution_desc: Frontend dev bundle, AI starter bundle — pick your role, get everything installed.

items.title: CLI Tool Installation
items.description: Powered by Homebrew. Install popular CLI tools with built-in quickstart guides.

items.title: AI Extensions One-Click
items.description: MCP servers, Cursor Skills / Commands / Rules — auto-configured and ready to use.

items.title: Recipe System
items.description: YAML-defined install recipes with JSON Schema validation, community contributions, and auto-publishing.

items.title: Dual Mode
items.description: Beginner mode with step-by-step guidance. Advanced mode for batch silent installs.

items.title: Bundle System
items.description: Role-based tool bundles. Frontend dev bundle, AI starter bundle — one command to install all.

items.title: Recipe Generator
items.description: Auto-generates YAML recipes from brew info / npm info using AI formatting.

metadata.title: yduck - One command to set up your macOS dev environment
metadata.description: A macOS CLI tool that installs dev tools and AI coding extensions (MCP/Skills/Rules) with a beginner-friendly interactive TUI.
